selectionRules: Only source=repo manifests are eligible for canonical repo cartridge selection.
Manifest entry must stay under collections/.
Manifest entry must not point into work/, logs/, repo-manual/, or .github/.
Manifest selection does not apply to Boards mode.
Renderer may be declared by manifest but still resolves through renderer-selection rules.
guardrails: Canonical repo cartridge manifests do not turn collections/ into writable runtime state.
Manifest selection is descriptor-driven repo loading, not repo mutation.
Boards remain approved-root live readouts outside this manifest path.
Save behavior remains bounded to terminal/saves/<tag>/ after selection.
